title: Anatomy
description: Component structure with positioned leader-line badges, specs table with token cross-references, and interactive state row

sections.parts: Letter-labeled callouts (A, B, C...) for every visible sub-element. figmaLayerName must match actual Figma layer names — badges are positioned by reading layer bounding boxes. Include container, text elements, icons, dividers — anything a developer needs to know about.
sections.partsTable: One row per anatomy part with: part letter, element name, relevant token (--zen-* name), and notes (resolved value, font spec). Links back to the structure diagram via part letter.
sections.states: All interactive states the component supports. Real component instances rendered in a horizontal row. Always include Default. Common states: Hovered, Focused, Active, Error, Disabled, Read-only.

qualityRules: Every visible sub-element must have a parts entry — don't skip container, decorative elements, or nested components
figmaLayerName MUST match actual Figma layer names from get_metadata — badges are positioned using these names
partsTable rows must use --zen-* token names, never raw pixel values in the token column
Letters must be sequential (A, B, C...) with no gaps
states must include Default plus every interactive state from the component's variant axes
Verify layer names against the component metadata before generating — incorrect names produce mispositioned badges
